title: sterculia lanceolata
intro: Sterculia lanceolata is a species of plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the sterculia tree. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the sterculia lanceolata tree are used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
